name: Bauxite Deposit
info: Aluminum-bearing ore — build a Mining Drill on top.

name: Titanium Deposit
info: Titanium-rich rock — build a Mining Drill on top.

name: Rare-Earth Deposit
info: Rare-earth ore — build a Mining Drill on top.

name: Silica Quarry
info: Silica sand — build a Mining Drill on top.

name: Coal Seam
info: Coal seam — build a Mining Drill on top.

name: Oil Field
info: Crude oil reservoir — build an Oil Derrick on top.

name: Water
info: Open water — nothing can be built on it. Route around it.

name: Rocky Ground
info: Barren rock — buildable ground with no resources.

name: Grassland
info: Fertile grassland — buildable ground with no resources.

name: Sand
info: Sandy flats — buildable ground with no resources.
